title: tunica caryophyllus
intro: Tunica caryophyllus, also known as Rose, is a perennial and deciduous flowering shrub native to the Northern Hemisphere. The rose plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of rose extracts and oil include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menstrual cramps and menopause. Herbal preparations of rose include rose petal tea, rose essential oil, and rose hip powder, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various health benefits.
